mapper.sql: id, emp_no, emp_name, password, gender, phone, email, dept_id, position, job_level, hire_date, emp_type, supervisor_id, role_code, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM emp_employee WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM emp_employee WHERE emp_no = #{empNo} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp_employee (emp_no, emp_name, password, gender, phone, email, dept_id, position, job_level, hire_date, emp_type, supervisor_id, role_code, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{empNo}, #{empName}, #{password}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{deptId}, #{position}, #{jobLevel}, #{hireDate}, #{empType}, #{supervisorId}, #{roleCode}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE emp_employee
emp_name = #{empName}, gender = #{gender}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, dept_id = #{deptId}, position = #{position}, job_level = #{jobLevel}, hire_date = #{hireDate}, emp_type = #{empType}, supervisor_id = #{supervisorId}, role_code = #{roleCode}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE emp_employee SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM emp_employee WHERE supervisor_id = #{supervisorId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1

SELECT e.id, e.emp_no, e.emp_name, e.gender, e.phone, e.email, e.dept_id, d.dept_name, e.position, e.job_level, e.hire_date, e.emp_type, e.supervisor_id, s.emp_name AS supervisor_name, e.role_code FROM emp_employee e LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON e.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN emp_employee s ON e.supervisor_id = s.id WHERE e.id = #{id} AND e.is_deleted = 0
